steps.title: Identify favorable outcomes
steps.content: From the frequency table, the number of igneous rocks is $10$. These are the favorable outcomes.

steps.title: Identify total outcomes
steps.content: The collection contains $70$ rocks in all, so the sample space has $70$ outcomes.

steps.title: Write the probability
steps.content: Probability is favorable outcomes divided by total outcomes, so $$P(\text{igneous})=\frac{10}{70}$$ The answer is D.
